title: Grok 5 — The Biggest AI News Is Here (Musk’s AGI Bet)
summary: A YouTube video analyzing rumors and claims about xAI's Grok 5 model, reporting on the Colossus 2 hardware infrastructure built with 500,000 GPUs, and examining Musk's assertion that Grok 5 is indistinguishable from AGI. The video grades credibility of various leaks, compares Grok 5 to competitors, and discusses pricing and safety considerations.
